mechanism_narrative: A sustained multi-month rise in FEDFUNDS during a hiking cycle raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as valuations compress.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 2.27% in Dec-2018 vintage after multiple 2018 hikes
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or SPX 20d forward returns are not significantly lower during FEDFUNDS uptrend periods versus flat/declining periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE falls below a historically low threshold of 4.0%, the labor market signals late-cycle tightness that typically precedes wage-driven inflation pressure and Fed over-tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.9% as of Dec-2018 vintage, near 50-year low
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in more than 60% of instances when UNRATE < 4.0%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in HOUST (housing starts) and deceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) jointly indicate broad-based consumer and housing demand weakening that is not captured by either series alone, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST revised value 1181.0 below vintage 1256.0 in Nov-2018
fact:RSAFS revised value 498854 below vintage 513531 in Nov-2018
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns are positive in more than 55% of joint-decline instances, or the interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over either series individually (interaction Rank IC not exceeding max of single-series IC by 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: During a late-cycle expansion coinciding with monetary tightening, a deceleration in INDPRO growth signals fading industrial momentum that historically leads equity markets by one to two quarters, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO YoY growth decelerates for 3 consecutive months
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO revised value 104.0681 below vintage 109.3931 in Nov-2018 indicating downward revision to production strength
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns fail to differ significantly (p > 0.05) between INDPRO deceleration periods and INDPRO acceleration periods within this regime.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises above CPIAUCSL-implied trailing inflation such that the real policy rate turns positive, monetary policy shifts from accommodative to restrictive, compressing equity risk premia and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 2.27% approaching CPIAUCSL YoY inflation levels as of Dec-2018
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns are not significantly lower when the constructed real rate is positive versus negative (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in PAYEMS reflects continued labor market expansion and consumer income growth, which sustains near-term risk appetite and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage_value 150263 thousand vs revised_value 149809 thousand as of Dec-2018, both indicating continued payroll expansion
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS monthly change and subsequent SPX 5d returns falls below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive PAYEMS months are not followed by higher-than-baseline positive return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: A year-over-year decline in HOUST (housing starts) is a leading indicator of broader economic slowdown given housing's sensitivity to credit conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST revised down to 1181.0 thousand units in Nov-2018 from prior vintage 1256.0
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tightening credit conditions
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns are positive in more than 55% of periods when HOUST YoY is negative, or Rank IC remains below 0.03 across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO growth decelerates while PAYEMS continues to expand, the divergence signals a late-cycle mismatch between labor demand and actual output that precedes margin compression and equity underperformance, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO revised value 104.0681 below vintage 109.3931 while PAYEMS remained near 150000 thousand as of late 2018
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns show no significant difference (p > 0.05) between divergence periods and non-divergence periods, or interaction Rank IC does not exceed single-series IC by at least 0.02.
